# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Completed the pending `ralph pr open` remediation in `src/contexts/bead_workflow/pr_open.rs`. The command now derives `git commit` pathspecs from all staged checkpoint output via `staged_commit_paths`, preserving pathspec-safe rename handling with `git diff --cached --name-only -z --no-renames -- .`, while keeping PR diff stats and reviewer guidance filtered to review-scope files. This ensures generated orchestration/backlog state such as `.ralph-burning/` and `.beads/` is included in the squash commit instead of being left staged or dirty after a successful PR open, while still excluding that state from PR review text. Added/kept regression coverage proving generated state is committed but omitted from PR body/reviewer text.","outstanding_risks":[],"steps":[{"description":"Inspected the current `pr_open` commit path handling, review-scope filtering, mock port, and regression tests around staged renames and generated metadata.","order":0,"status":"completed"},{"descr
